Please note: If the 62 Day Breach Date is blank, the patient is on a 31 Day Pathway. Please ensure that the Decision To Treat Date is within 31 days of the Treatment Date.

Diagnosis: Tubular adenoma with HGD
ICD10 Code: D12.6
Differentiation: Moderately differentiated

Intermittent rectal bleeding, mucous discharge, altered bowel habit and abdominal discomfort for 5 weeks. Additional symptoms include pelvic pressure. Past medical history significant for coeliac disease.

CT colonography on 20/04/2024: large polypoid lesion in sigmoid colon; T2 N0 M0 if cancer
